name: feedcontext-skill
description: Source repository and installable artifact for the FeedContext Skill

scripts.build: pnpm run build:helper && git diff --exit-code -- skills/feedcontext/scripts/helper.mjs
scripts.build:helper: bun build src/feedcontext.ts --format esm --packages bundle --target node --minify --outfile skills/feedcontext/scripts/helper.mjs
scripts.eval:contract: failed=0; for case_dir in evals/cases/*; do if [ -d "$case_dir/reference-output" ]; then node evals/check-contract.mjs --contract "$case_dir/expected.contract.json" --output-dir "$case_dir/reference-output" || failed=1; fi; done; exit $failed
